name: Sandford Birdsey
title: CEO
bio:
Sandford Birdsey is the founder and CEO of Birdsey Group, where he leads strategy, capital relationships, and execution standards across the firm's commercial, residential, construction, and corporate affiliates.

Over more than three decades in commercial real estate, Sandford has overseen more than $250 billion in loan balance across single-asset and large-portfolio transactions, working with financial institutions, government agencies, investment banks, rating agencies, and B-piece investors.

**Areas of focus**

* Building and scaling the Birdsey Standard across affiliate operations.
* Anchoring institutional capital relationships through cycles.
* Mentoring the next generation of Birdsey leadership.

Sandford is based in Atlanta, Georgia, and serves clients nationwide.
